name: Verdant Heartwood
ecological_description: Lush, interconnected forest biome pulsing with the living web. High regen when tended with mercy and attunement. Species respond to player presence: resonant deer approach with blessings on merciful paths, ancient trees amplify resonance. Every action ripples across zones. Base for all ecological epiphanies and audio layers.
notes: v18.10 basic ecological seed data. Provides shared parameters for all scenarios in this biome. Audio-ready defaults for fundsp integration. Expandable with more species, seasonal cycles, multiplayer web effects.
